data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the Facebook Messenger booking option.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a Facebook Messenger booking option as part of the use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any direct confirmation of this feature being implemented or validated in the current saga run. The linked use case mentions the need for this option, but without concrete evidence of its implementation, the requirement remains unverified.
gaps: No evidence of the Facebook Messenger booking option being implemented.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the Facebook Messenger booking option.
